=== Zyins/Reference/Reference.cs ===
namespace Isa.Sdk.Zyins.Reference;
public interface IConceptMatcher
public interface IMedicationMatcher : IConceptMatcher
public interface IConditionMatcher : IConceptMatcher
public interface IAnyConceptMatcher : IConceptMatcher
public interface IReferenceFacade
public class Reference
    public IReferenceFacade Instance
    public IMedicationMatcher Medications { ... }
    public IConditionMatcher Conditions { ... }
    public IAnyConceptMatcher Concepts { ... }
    public IMedicationMatcher Medications { ... }
    public IConditionMatcher Conditions { ... }
    public IAnyConceptMatcher Concepts { ... }
    public IConcept Match(...)
    public IReadOnlyList<IMedicationConcept> List(...)
    public IConcept Match(...)
    public IReadOnlyList<IConditionConcept> List(...)
    public IConcept Match(...)
    public IReadOnlyList<IConcept> MatchMany(...)
    public string? Id { ... }
    public string Name { ... }
    public ConceptKind Kind { ... }
    public bool IsKnown { ... }
    public string InputText { ... }
    public IReadOnlyList<IConditionConcept> Conditions(...)
    public IReadOnlyList<IMedicationConcept> Medications(...)
    public bool Equals(...)
    public bool Equals(...)
    public int GetHashCode(...)
    public IMedicationConcept Medication(...)
    public IConditionConcept Condition(...)
    public IConcept Unknown(...)
    public IReadOnlyList<IConditionConcept> Conditions(...)
    public IReadOnlyList<IMedicationConcept> Medications(...)

    public ITransport? Transport { ... }
    public IClock? Clock { ... }
    public DebugLogger? Logger { ... }
    public ICaseStorage? CaseStorage { ... }
    public IReadOnlyDictionary<string, IsaApiVersion>? ApiVersion { ... }
    public partial class ZyInsClient { ... }
    public string DefaultBaseUrl
    public PrequalifySubClient Prequalify { ... }
    public QuoteSubClient Quote { ... }
    public DatasetsSubClient Datasets { ... }
    public ProductsSubClient Products { ... }

=== Zyins/ZyinsFactory.cs ===
namespace Isa.Sdk.Zyins;
public interface IEnvironment
public class SystemEnvironment : IEnvironment
    public SystemEnvironment Instance
    public string? Get(...)
    public required string Keycode { ... }
    public required string Email { ... }
    public string? DeviceId { ... }
    public string? SigningSecret { ... }
    public required string SessionId { ... }
    public required string SessionSecret { ... }
    public ZyInsClient WithBearer(...)
    public ZyInsClient WithBearer(...)
    public ZyInsClient WithLicense(...)
    public ZyInsClient WithLicense(...)
    public ZyInsClient WithLicense(...)
    public ZyInsClient WithSession(...)
    public ZyInsClient WithSession(...)
